name: business-one
description: General-purpose small business landing page. Blocks sourced from prebuiltui on 21st.dev. All components share Poppins font and consistent styling.

heading.hint: Main headline text, displayed in large font (text-4xl md:text-7xl)

announcement_text.hint: Small banner text above the heading, e.g. 'New announcement on your inbox'

announcement_cta.hint: CTA link text for the announcement banner, e.g. 'Read more'

cta_primary_href.hint: Link for the primary CTA button

cta_secondary_href.hint: Link for the secondary CTA button

background_image_url.hint: URL for the section background image

heading.hint: Section heading, e.g. 'Powerful Features' or 'What We Offer'

features.hint: Feature cards. Each has an image, title, and description. Create 3-6 items.

community_text.hint: Social proof text above heading, e.g. 'Join community of 1m+ founders'

heading.hint: CTA heading, displayed as large gradient text

button_label.hint: Button text, e.g. 'Contact Us' or 'Get Started'

avatar_urls.hint: 3 avatar image URLs for the social proof section

logo_url.hint: Business logo URL displayed above the testimonial

heading.hint: Intro text before the testimonial quote, e.g. 'Hear from our customers'

author_name.hint: Name of the person giving the testimonial

author_role.hint: Job title or role of the author

author_image_url.hint: Profile image URL for the author

description.hint: Short business description displayed below the logo
